zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多格局
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD价格围绕6.55附近整理，整体仍运行在20日均线6.35上方，短期结构偏震荡上行，低点逐步抬高，市场情绪略偏多头但力度有限。

MACD指标仍维持小幅正值0.052，显示动能偏强但已出现放缓迹象，RSI暂缺但从价格结构看未进入超买区间，短线动能趋于均衡。

下方关键支撑位关注6.53与6.50区域，若失守可能回测6.35均线支撑；上方阻力集中在6.60及6.75附近，突破后有望延续反弹空间。

短线建议以区间震荡思路为主，在6.50上方低吸、接近6.60分批止盈，并严格设置跌破6.35的风控止损，等待方向选择确认。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently in a short-term consolidation phase after a modest 24-hour decline of 0.47%, indicating limited bearish pressure. Price action remains tightly compressed near 6.55, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite intraday softness, the broader structure is mildly constructive as the market continues to hold above its 20-day simple moving average. This positioning reflects underlying resilience and potential for gradual trend continuation if momentum improves.

MACD reading at 0.052 shows a nascent bullish momentum signal, although the absence of a signal line limits full confirmation of crossover strength. Even so, positive territory implies buyers are slowly regaining control. With RSI unavailable, moving averages become more important, and price trading above the SMA(20) at 6.36 reinforces short-term support. This alignment suggests a cautiously bullish bias, provided volatility remains contained and volume supports continuation.

Immediate support is identified at 6.53, followed by stronger structural support near the SMA20 zone at 6.36. A breakdown below this region could expose deeper retracement toward 6.20. On the upside, resistance is concentrated at 6.60, which aligns with recent highs. A decisive break above this level may open the path toward 6.75 and potentially the psychological 7.00 zone, where historical supply pressure could re-emerge.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy with bullish tilt. Accumulation near 6.53–6.36 support zone may offer favorable risk-reward opportunities, provided stops are placed below 6.30 to protect against breakdown risk. Alternatively, breakout traders may wait for a confirmed close above 6.60 with volume expansion before entering long positions. Given current compression, patience and disciplined risk management remain essential in navigating near-term volatility.
